---
title: ""
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: yetti
logo: images/logo.png
server: shiny
---
```{r}
#| message: false
#| context: setup

library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(tidyverse)
library(bsicons)
library(knitr)


pokemon <- read_csv("data/pokemondata.csv",
                    col_select = c(4:13, 26:32))
```

# {.sidebar}

This dashboard contains information on all 1203 Pokémon from generations 1-9

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Dedication

This project is dedicated to my dad and our 2016 late-night poke-runs 

:::

# Overview

## Row {height="50%"}


```{r}
#| title: Generation

pokemon %>% count(Generation) %>% kable(col.names = c("Generation", "Count"))
```


```{r}
#| title: Distribution of Types
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "100%"

pokemon %>%
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = Type1, fill = Type1)) +
  geom_bar(show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Type 1", y = "Count")
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: Stacked Bar Chart of Average Statistics, by Type 1
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "100%"

pokemon_avg <- pokemon %>% 
  group_by(Type1) %>%
  summarise(
    "Average Attack" = mean(Attack),
    "Average HP" = mean(HP),
    "Average Defense" = mean(Defense),
    "Average Total" = mean (Total)
  ) %>%
  arrange(`Average Total`)

pokemon_pivot <- pokemon_avg %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Average Attack", "Average HP", "Average Defense"),
    names_to = "Stats",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

pokemon_pivot %>%
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = Type1, y = Value, fill = Stats)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Average HP" = "#2596be",
    "Average Defense" = "#3266b1",
    "Average Attack" = "#ffcb00"
  )) +
  labs(y = "Average Statistics")

```


```{r}
#| title: Table of Average Statistics, by Type 1
#| fig-cap: "*The total score for any given pokemon contains more than the three variables shown, but these are the only ones highlighted for simplicity*"


pokemon_avg %>%
  arrange(`Average Total`) %>%
  kable(digits = 0)
```

# My favorites

## Row

::: {.card title="Sudowoodo"}

![I like Sudowoodo because he does a little dance and jazz hands that make me smile. He's a rock type who's abilities are Sturdy and Rock Head](images/sudowoodo.png){height=300px}
:::

::: {.card title="Mudkip"}

![I like Mudkip for his contrasting colors and little star cheeks. He's a water type who's main ability is Torrent](images/mudkip.png){height=300px}
:::

::: {.card title="Grookey"}

![I like Grookey because he has a really sweet smile and I like the little stick in his hair. He's a grass type with overgrow ability](images/grookey.png){height=300px}
:::

# Battle!

```{r}

page_fillable(
  card(
    card_header("Select first Pokemon"),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(2,6),
    card_image(
      "images/poke_ball.png",
      height = "200px", 
      width = "200px"
    ),
    selectInput(
      "poke1",
      "Choice 1",
      choices = pokemon$Name,
      selected = 1)
  )),
  card(
  card_header("Select second Pokemon"),
  layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(2, 6),
    card_image(
      "images/poke_ball.png", 
      height = "200px", 
      width = "200px"
    ),
    selectInput(
      "poke2",
      "Choice 2",
      choices = pokemon$Name,
      selected = 1
    )
  )),
  card(
  card_image(
    "images/stars.png", 
    height = "200px",
    width = "200px"),
  textOutput("winner"))

)
```

```{r}
#| context: server
  
  selected_pokemon1 <- reactive({
    pokemon |>
      filter(Name == input$poke1)
  })
  
 
  selected_pokemon2 <- reactive({
    pokemon |>
      filter(Name == input$poke2)
  })
  

  output$winner <- renderText({
    paste("The winner is", ifelse(selected_pokemon1()$Total>selected_pokemon2()$Total, input$poke1, input$poke2),"!")
  })

```
